tick_over_tick_delta_vs_1230.interpretation: STRATEGY QUIET TICK. Zero trades, zero fills, zero rejections in the 30-min 12:30→13:00 window. The 12:14:55 PHARMABEES submission was followed by a 45-minute pause — the longest mid-session gap so far today. Multiple readings are possible: (i) the 12:30 min_confidence step to 0.65 is biting and gating admissions out; (ii) the strategy is digesting the 7-BUY morning burst and observing the lunch session; (iii) the 0.65 deployment cap (binding 7.44 pp under projected full-fill) has closed the admission window outright and the strategy has no organic SELL candidate within its conviction set. None of the three readings warrant a fresh lever fire — the system is operating as designed: cap binds, sector cap binds, confidence floor binds, and a quiet tick is the EXPECTED outcome after 90 min of binding back-pressure. Risk level held at MEDIUM.

findings: STRATEGY SILENT for 45+ min: no BUY, no SELL, no MODIFY since PHARMABEES OPEN at 12:14:55. First sustained mid-session quiet stretch today. Significantly less concerning than the Day-2 6h+ silence (the binding deployment cap is the proximate cause here, not strategy-layer paralysis).

Three OPEN orders aging without fills: TATAPOWER (167 min, ₹443 limit), HINDZINC (137 min, ₹612 limit), PHARMABEES (45 min, ₹23.65 limit). Combined open-book value ₹130,105 (13.00% of capital). Long age on TATAPOWER + HINDZINC (>2h) suggests limits sit below current market — patient pricing, not hot pursuit. Worth noting for the next strategy_review tick: if these stay unfilled into market close, they convert to overnight risk decisions.
Cash buffer: ₹406,119.48 (40.55% of capital) — comfortably above the 20% min_cash_buffer_pct floor. On full open-book fill, cash drops to ₹276,014.48 (27.56%) — still above floor with 7.56 pp room.
Daily realized P&L: +₹131.38 (+0.013% of capital). Buffer to -1% findings trigger ~₹10,147; buffer to base 3% loss gate ~₹30,178. Loss-gate tightening absent — Trigger A dormant.

Deployment posture: filled 59.45% (0.55 pp below the 60% Trigger M threshold), full-fill projection 72.44% (binding 7.44 pp ABOVE the 0.65 cap). The cap continues to gate any NEW BUY admission. Composition of the binding 7.44 pp gap: TATAPOWER 4.87% + HINDZINC 4.58% + PHARMABEES 3.54% = 12.99% in-flight grandfathered open-book value vs ~5.55% admission slot if all 3 fill (would breach cap by 7.44 pp without a SELL).
Largest single-name (filled): NESTLEIND 11.99% — unchanged, 3.01 pp BUFFER below the 0.15 per-name cap. No per-name trigger firing.

Power-sector cluster: 4 names on full fill (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID filled, TATAPOWER OPEN), 19.77% of capital, 2.23 pp buffer to the 22% sector cap. Trigger I escalation legs (5th Power name OR Power >22%) BOTH dormant — risk level NOT escalated to HIGH on cluster grounds. The cap holds the line.

Sector breakdowns all under 22% cap: Power 19.77% > FMCG 16.74% > BFSI 17.62% > Pharma 8.73% > Gold ETF 5.00% > Metals 4.58%. Most-binding sector cap remains Power at 2.23 pp buffer; second-tightest BFSI at 4.38 pp buffer.

Trigger A (PnL loss-gate) DORMANT: realized P&L positive +₹131.38; buffer to -1% findings trigger ~₹10,147; buffer to base 3% loss gate ~₹30,178. Loss-gate tightening on a positive book remains theatrical.

Trigger D (composite distress HIGH/CRITICAL meta) DORMANT on all 3 legs: book P&L positive (not in distress), no single-name LTP feed but no fresh distress signal, strategy silent for 45 min but in a CONTROLLED way (cap-induced, not paralysis-induced — 4 trades earlier in the 12:00-12:14 burst confirm strategy is not stuck). Risk level MEDIUM accurately captures the steady state.
Trigger F (BUY-cadence escalation, RE-ARMED post-12:30 with 7th-BUY arm) DORMANT: zero new BUY attempts in 12:30→13:00 window. Cumulative session BUY count frozen at 7.
Trigger I (Power cluster, RE-ARMED at 22% maximum) DORMANT on BOTH legs: no 5th Power name, Power exposure 19.77% (unchanged). 2.23 pp buffer to escalation line.

Trigger M (OPEN-fill cascade) DORMANT: zero OPEN orders filled in window (TATAPOWER + HINDZINC + PHARMABEES all still OPEN). Filled deployment 59.45% sits 0.55 pp below the 60% threshold — needle-thin buffer; would fire if HINDZINC or any single OPEN fills (₹45,900 → +4.58 pp filled deployment to 64.03%).
Trigger N (BUY-without-intervening-SELL) DORMANT: zero BUYs to test against. Re-arms at next BUY attempt; spec carries forward unchanged from 12:30.

Trigger P (repurchase/recycle pattern) DORMANT this tick: no new admissions to evaluate against name-level or sector-level recycle test. The 12:30 escalation note (action-adjacent) holds — if any next admission is in Pharma, Power, or BFSI within 24h of an exit in the same name/sector, Trigger P promotes to a hard fire on min_confidence 0.65→0.68 or a new sector-specific freeze.
Trigger G (MAHABANK extension watch) DORMANT: no fresh LTP feed; pnl_pct unobservable this tick. Cost-basis exposure unchanged 9.77% of capital.

Trigger H (TATAPOWER fill watch) DORMANT but AGE-NOTABLE: 167 min stale at ₹443 limit. If still OPEN at 14:00 (210 min, ~3.5h), worth flagging to strategy as a candidate for cancellation/reprice rather than letting it carry into close.
Trigger L (HINDZINC fill watch) DORMANT but AGE-NOTABLE: 137 min stale at ₹612 limit. Same observation as Trigger H — 3h aging by 13:43 if unfilled.
actions_taken: NO LEVER CHANGES. All seven active overrides held at 12:30 levels: min_confidence=0.65, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.65, default_sl_pct=0.015, min_sl_pct=0.01, max_sl_pct=0.04, max_sector_pct=0.22. Zero pre-armed triggers fired in this 30-min window — book QUIET, no new admissions to gate, no new clusters to ring-fence, no realized loss to escalate against. Tightening levers in the absence of a firing trigger would be theatrical, would add admission friction without addressing any live risk vector, and would increase reversal risk if the next session phase calls for the strategy to act on freed deployment.

Risk level HELD at MEDIUM (not raised to HIGH or CRITICAL, not lowered to LOW). Drivers: (i) composite distress meta-trigger D dormant on all 3 legs — book P&L MORE positive than 12:00 (+₹131.38 realized vs +₹89.58); (ii) Power cluster holds at 19.77%, 2.23 pp buffer to 22% cap (escalation legs dormant); (iii) cadence-quality controls (0.65 deployment cap, 0.22 sector cap, 0.65 confidence floor) all binding as designed — system operating exactly as specified; (iv) BFSI grandfathered breach RESOLVED status from 12:30 holds (17.62% < 22% cap, 4.38 pp buffer). Lowering to LOW would be premature: 7.44 pp deployment binding gap, 2.23 pp Power buffer, and three aging OPEN orders together represent unfinished structural work — not LOW-risk steady state.

Logged the 45-min strategy silence as observability data — NOT escalated. The silence is structurally distinct from the Day-2 6h+ paralysis silence: this one occurs UNDER a binding 0.65 deployment cap with the strategy having just executed a 4-trade burst at 12:14, indicating cap-induced quiet rather than decision-layer freeze. If silence extends through 14:00 (>1h45m without action) AND the cap gap remains binding AND no OPEN orders fill, escalate to a posture review (not a lever fire) at the 14:00 tick.

Logged TATAPOWER (167 min) and HINDZINC (137 min) OPEN-order ageing as observability data for next strategy_review tick. No risk-monitor action — order management is a strategy-layer decision; risk monitor only intervenes on cluster/cap/loss-gate vectors, not on individual order hygiene. Flag the ageing for the strategy's awareness.
